name: Sree Ram Gopal Reddy Thodeme
tagline: Building intelligent products at the intersection of AI and real-world impact.

milestones.title: Looking for an employment opportunity as an AI Solutions Developer · Individual Contributor
milestones.description: Returned to Germany in July 2026 to continue my career path as an AI Solutions Developer. Registered with AfA till I find a local employer.

milestones.title: AI Solutions Developer · Individual Contributor
milestones.description: Designing and shipping AI-powered products end-to-end — from concept to MVP to production. Temporarily relocated to India to take care of family commitments, where I spent time upskilling in AI and NLP and worked on real-world business solutions in a small company called JVS switchgears private limited, Hyderabad, India.

milestones.title: Balance between growing family commitments and career.
milestones.description: Made a conscious decision to move to AI Solutions Development, a field where my past experiences can be applied to create real-world business solutions.

milestones.title: International Design Patent
milestones.description: 'Design Patents' (one approved, one pending) for my innovations in Automotive Product Development

milestones.title: Recognition from Ford Motor Company
milestones.description: 'Certificate of Excellence' from Ford Product Development, Ford Motor Company

milestones.title: Product Owner & Product Developer in Ford Motor Company, Germany
milestones.description: As 'Systems Engineer' (eqivalent to 'Product Owner' in IT field), owned prodcuts from concept to production. Led cross-functional, cross-cultural teams across Germany, India, Turkey & USA.

milestones.title: Project Leader & Designer
milestones.description: Delivered engineering projects spanning design, development, and team leadership in India, Malaysia, Japan, and Germany.

milestones.title: Masters in Engineering · India
milestones.description: Graduate engineering degree laying the foundation for a career across product, design, and technology.
